en.extract:
The Biak white-eye (Zosterops mysorensis) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to the islands of Biak and Supiori in West Papua, Indonesia.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''Biak white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops mysorensis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the islands of [[Biak]] and [[Supiori Island|Supiori]] in [[West Papua (region)|West Papua]], [[Indonesia]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
